novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question frontier
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Bonvini, Kennedy, and Keele (EcoSta 2025 proceedings), whose abstract explicitly treats the two-time-point g-formula with HOIF estimators and minimax-optimal rates in some anisotropic/structured models; the proposal must establish exact model/rate separation.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question frontier
novelty_flags.one_line: Its consumer, “It determines when first-order inference suffices and when a longitudinal higher-order correction is necessary,” names neither a paper, an open problem, nor an applied domain.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question chained-converse
novelty_flags.one_line: Its consumer, “A positive answer supplies the lower-bound half of the frontier,” is an internal proof role rather than a named external consumer.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question correction-architecture
novelty_flags.one_line: Its consumer, “It supplies the tuning architecture of any attaining estimator,” is generic and names no external paper, problem, or applied domain.

soundness_flags.label: def:sequential-hoif-handle / oeq:frontier
soundness_flags.one_line: The selected estimator is not uniquely defined: the projection spaces, dimensions, U-statistic kernels, and nuisance-fitting rule are absent, while the displayed construction requires a full fitted density \(\widehat g\) although \(\mathcal G_d^t(M)\) imposes no outgoing-state regularity that would support uniform density estimation.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define one concrete sequential HOIF estimator, including basis dimensions, correction kernels, foldwise nuisance fits, and whether \(\widehat T\) is replaced by direct regression of the pseudo-outcome; otherwise add the outgoing-state regularity needed for density estimation and rederive the rate.

Add Bonvini–Kennedy–Keele (EcoSta 2025) as the closest competitor and state a precise inclusion/exclusion comparison between its anisotropic/structured classes and the proposed transition-L1-Hölder Markov class.
Replace each internal consumer with a named target, such as minimax inference for a two-decision physiologic-challenge regime or the Cinelli et al. optimality open problem.

Specify the two lower-bound calibrations \((J,\rho,\eta,\epsilon,\delta)\) and tie each to its claimed exponent, so the chained mixture is a usable matched-converse route rather than a generic device.

recommended_next_step: Revise the estimator into a mathematically specified, estimable construction and differentiate it sharply from the 2025 two-time-point g-formula HOIF work before advancing to Stage 0.
